commentary_links.hebrew: הַ לְיְהֹוָה֙*(בספרי תימן הַֽלְיהֹוָה֙ בתיבה אחת) תִּגְמְלוּ־זֹ֔את        עַ֥ם נָבָ֖ל וְלֹ֣א חָכָ֑ם הֲלוֹא־הוּא֙ אָבִ֣יךָ קָּנֶ֔ךָ        ה֥וּא עָשְׂךָ֖ וַֽיְכֹנְנֶֽךָ׃
commentary_links.english:
Do you thus requite GOD,
O dull and witless people?
Is not this the FathercFather I.e., the One who conveys legitimacy and provides ongoing support, in return for loyalty. who created you—
Fashioned you and made you endure!
commentary_links.matched_snippet: הוא עשך ויכננך מלמד שברא הקדוש ברוך הוא

commentary_links.hebrew: מִמֶּ֤נּוּ פִנָּה֙ מִמֶּ֣נּוּ יָתֵ֔ד מִמֶּ֖נּוּ קֶ֣שֶׁת מִלְחָמָ֑ה מִמֶּ֛נּוּ יֵצֵ֥א כׇל־נוֹגֵ֖שׂ יַחְדָּֽו׃
commentary_links.english:
From them shall come cornerstones,
From them tent pegs,hcornerstones, / From them tent pegs Emendation yields “shields and bucklers.”
From them bows of combat,
And every captain shall also arise from them.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: מלכיו שנאמר ממנו פנה ממנו יתד וגו
